search-starbucks.description: Search for Starbucks and navigate to it
search-starbucks.verifier: try { const cartData = localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart'); if (!cartData) return false; const state = JSON.parse(cartData).state; if (!state || !state.currentStore || !state.currentStore.name) return false; return state.currentStore.name.includes('Starbucks'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }
